'''Rythani Products''' was a technology-manufacturing company based on [[Rydonni Prime]] that involved in the development of a variety of combat vehicles, such as the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] models. They were sympathetic to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], producing various maintenance parts and prototypes even after the fall of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].<ref name="Easy Credits" />

{{Company-stub}}
